0.title: ClusterStatus.green Minimum (by ClientId)
0.query:
timeseries cluster_statusgreen_minimum_by_client_id = avg(cloud.aws.es.cluster_statusgreen_minimum_by_client_id), by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(dt.entity.custom_device, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(cluster_statusgreen_minimum_by_client_id) desc
| limit 20
